name: year_offset range with where filters
description: Test case for year_offset range with where filters
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2018,2019,2020,2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('QB')), "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "tdf8bbf906aac20828c8454802a8d584b" as (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 0 END as pass_comp_pct_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(psr_pid)), "t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa" as (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."fantasy_points_from_plays" AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.fantasy_points_from_plays) FROM t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8 WHERE t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.pid = t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.pid AND t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.year BETWEEN t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year + 1 AND t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year + 3) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_1", "tdf8bbf906aac20828c8454802a8d584b"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays" AS "pass_comp_pct_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa.pass_comp_pct_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa.pass_comp_pct_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa WHERE t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa.pid = t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.pid AND t3155347b2084231f2966c1348628c9aa.year BETWEEN t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year + 1 AND t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year + 3) AS "pass_comp_pct_from_plays_1", "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."year", "player"."pos" from "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid" inner join "t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8" on "t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8"."pid" = "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid" and t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.year BETWEEN t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year + 1 AND tdf8bbf906aac20828c8454802a8d584b.year = t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457.year and tdf8bbf906aac20828c8454802a8d584b.year IN (2018,2019,2020,2021) where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."fantasy_points_from_plays", t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.fantasy_points_from_plays, "tdf8bbf906aac20828c8454802a8d584b"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays", "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."year", "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" having SUM(t97e6fb711a9108b03bbb84f064bfa5d8.fantasy_points_from_plays) >= '300' order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "t693c7ac20b51defe4b48cad9721f5457"."pid" asc limit 500
